CodeCell — add_code()

def hello():
    return 'world'


if __name__ == '__main__':
    print(hello())

PlotlyCell — add_plotly()

Iris Dataset (interactive)

MermaidCell — add_mermaid()

---
title: Simple sample
---
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Still
    Still --> [*]
    Still --> Moving
    Moving --> Still
    Moving --> Crash
    Crash --> [*]
pie showData
    title Key elements in Product X
    "Calcium" : 42.96
    "Potassium" : 50.05
    "Magnesium" : 10.01
    "Iron" : 5
gantt
    title A Gantt Diagram
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Section
        A task          :a1, 2014-01-01, 30d
        Another task    :after a1, 20d
    section Another
        Task in Another :2014-01-12, 12d
        another task    :24d
